title: Planning Hajj 2026? Key updates, visa rules, Nusuk registration and important deadlines you shouldn’t miss
summary_full: Saudi Arabia is accelerating Hajj 2026 preparations with earlier visa processing and a fully digital Nusuk platform for millions of pilgrims. Strict timelines and new regulations aim to enhance safety and efficiency, while regional tensions may cause minor flight disruptions. Pilgrims must adhere to digital registration and compliance rules for a smoother experience.
